title: linum suffruticosum subsp. montserratii
intro: Linum suffruticosum subsp. montserratii is a sub-species of the flax plant, commonly known as a type of blue flax, and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its high content of mucilages, which provide anti-inflammatory and soothing effects. The health benefits of Linum suffruticosum subsp. montserratii include its ability to treat digestive issues, skin irritations, and respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to treat a range of health issues and promote overall well-being.
